IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Smiles Charity is a non-profit organization founded to benefit charitable organizations that build homes for deserving families. Smiles Charity will donate its profits to build homes for wounded war veterans.
IRS990.MissionDesc: Smiles Charity is a non-profit organization founded to benefit charitable organizations that build homes for deserving families. Most recently, Smiles Charity will donate its profits to build or renovate homes for wounded war veterans.
IRS990.Desc: Smiles Charity utilizes a unique fundraising concept of bringing an entire community together for a free concert and family festival. Generous local and corporate businesses sponsor the annual concert and family festival held the Sunday before Memorial Day in McKinney, TX. Thousands attend the concert and family festival donating even more money and raising even more awareness for the designated beneficiary. 100 of the net proceeds from the annual event are then donated to build the designated home. The Smiles Charity Concert and Family Festival features an outdoor concert on the stage surrounded by a family friendly festival and concludes with a spectacular fireworks display. The festival includes a childrens area, food vendors, and a VIP party. From bounce houses to rock climbing , the children have a great time. Most of the childrens area vendors donate their services or provide them at a discounted rate. Local food vendors sell concessions to the attendees of the concert and family festival. Each food vendor donates a minimum of 20 of their proceeds to Smiles Charity

IRS990ScheduleG.ExplanationIfNoTxt: A non profit organization is allowed to hold one raffel a year in the state of Texas.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Some McKinney families are now living the dream of home ownership after moving into their homes sponsored by Smiles Charity and built by North Collin County Habitat for Humanity, Operation Finally Home, Helping A Hero, Operation Forever Free and various home builders. Specially adapted homes have been built for qualifying service members and their families. Each year, the net proceeds from the concert and family festival has been enough to build a home. The concert and family festival continues to grow. Founder, Dr. Jennifer Buchanans vision is to change the world, one family, one home and one community at a time. The total for noncash contributions gifts in kind-services is 33,000. The total for noncash contributions gifts in kind-use of materials and equipment is 5,000.
